data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding deposit collection vs full payment.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to deposit collection versus full payment. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or traces from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected results were achieved. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of scenario simulation outcomes or traces.
